issue_title: Add test for nation name length and fix names exceeding 27 chars
issue_body_preview:
## Description:

Added tests/NationNameLength.test.ts to enforce nation name length ≤27.  
Updated manifest.json files in resources/maps with shorter names to pass the test.
This fix ensures that names will no longer be truncated

Examples of country names that are too long and have their endi
test_description_zh: 在游戏地图中查看所有国家/地区的名称显示，特别关注名称较长的国家（如之前超过27个字符的国家名称），检查名称是否完整显示而没有被截断。
expected_result_zh: 所有国家/地区的名称应完整显示，不会出现文字被截断或末尾缺失的情况，所有名称长度不超过27个字符且内容完整可读。
